verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus my pasion in life is to know you That you're all that goes bowed down to this journey of loving you more Jesus you showered your goodness on me Given your gift so frely there's one thing I'd long for Hear my hearts call And my prayer for this life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Above all else Above all else Above all else Give me yourself

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus my pasion in life is to know you That you're all that goes bowed down to this journey of loving you more Jesus you showered your goodness on me Given your gift so frely there's one thing I long for Hear my hearts call And my prayer for this life
